Entry.JapaneseText: スパーダ
Entry.EnglishText: Spada

Entry.JapaneseText: ルカ
Entry.EnglishText: Ruca

Entry.JapaneseText: エミル
Entry.EnglishText: Emil

Entry.JapaneseText: マルタ
Entry.EnglishText: Marta

Entry.JapaneseText: いよォ、ルカ。 まさかお前が世界樹目指すなんて 思いもしなかったぜ
Entry.EnglishText: Y'know, Ruca... I never woulda thought you'd be headin' for the World Tree.

Entry.JapaneseText: だって仕方がないじゃないか
Entry.EnglishText: I mean, I don't have a choice, do I?

Entry.JapaneseText: 父さんや母さん。 それに友達や街のみんなを助ける為には 世界樹に行くしか方法がないんだから
Entry.EnglishText: The only way to save my dad and mom, and my friends and everyone in town, is to get to the World Tree.

Entry.JapaneseText: へっ。 世界樹に行きゃあ 疫病治す方法がわかるってのかよ？
Entry.EnglishText: Heh. So ya mean you'll figure out a way to cure the plague if ya get there?

Entry.JapaneseText: ……保証なんてないよ。 だけど、あの疫病がマナの枯渇のせいで 蔓延してるのは確かなんだ
Entry.EnglishText: ...I can't be sure of it. But I do know the plague is spreading because the mana is drying up.

Entry.JapaneseText: だったらマナを生み出してたはずの 世界樹のところに行けば なにかわかるかもしれない
Entry.EnglishText: But if we go to the World Tree, which is supposed to be producing mana, we might learn something.

Entry.JapaneseText: なんの保証もないけど、それでも 病気で苦しむみんなの為に なにかしたいんだ
Entry.EnglishText: There's no guarantee this will work, but even so, I wanna do something for the sake of everyone who is suffering from this plague.

Entry.JapaneseText: 言う事は立派だがよ ホントにお前なんかが 世界樹に辿り着けると思ってんのかよ？
Entry.EnglishText: That all sounds impressive, but do ya really think someone like you can actually make it to the World Tree?

Entry.JapaneseText: 世界樹周辺には 凶暴な魔物も出没するって聞いてるぜェ
Entry.EnglishText: I've heard that savage monsters are infestin' the area around it.

Entry.JapaneseText: お前みてェな弱虫が近付いた日にゃあ 肉は食いちぎられて 骨はしゃぶりつくされて……
Entry.EnglishText: If a coward like you goes near there, your flesh is gonna be ripped off an' torn apart, an' your bones'll be totally inhaled...

Entry.JapaneseText: う、うわぁぁぁぁぁ！！！ やめてよぉ、スパーダ
Entry.EnglishText: U-UWAAAAAA!!! Knock it off, Spada!

Entry.JapaneseText: ヒャッハッハッハッハ！！ やっぱお前は弱虫ルカだな
Entry.EnglishText: Hyahahahahahahaha!! Ya really are a coward, Ruca.

Entry.JapaneseText: うぅ……
Entry.EnglishText: Uuuh...

Entry.JapaneseText: ちょっと待ってよ、スパーダ
Entry.EnglishText: Hold on a second, Spada.

Entry.JapaneseText: あぁ？ トロトロ歩いてんじゃねェよ、ルカ
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? Quit walkin' so slow, Ruca.

Entry.JapaneseText: そんな事言ったって……
Entry.EnglishText: Even if you tell me that...

Entry.JapaneseText: うわっ！
Entry.EnglishText: Whoa!

Entry.JapaneseText: いたっ！
Entry.EnglishText: Ow!

Entry.JapaneseText: ご、ごめんなさい！ 大丈夫ですか？
Entry.EnglishText: I-I'm sorry! Are you okay?!

Entry.JapaneseText: こ、こっちこそごめんね。 怪我はなかった？
Entry.EnglishText: I-I'm sorry, too. Did I hurt you?

Entry.JapaneseText: エ〜ミル、なにやってんの？
Entry.EnglishText: Eeeeemil, what are you doing?

Entry.JapaneseText: あっ、マルタ。 歩いてたらこの人にぶつかっちゃって……
Entry.EnglishText: Ah, Marta. I bumped into this person while walking...

Entry.JapaneseText: そうなんだ
Entry.EnglishText: Oh, I see.

Entry.JapaneseText: キミ、ごめんね。 怪我はなかった？
Entry.EnglishText: Hey there, sorry. Are you hurt?

Entry.JapaneseText: 僕はぜんぜん……
Entry.EnglishText: I'm fine...

Entry.JapaneseText: おう、コラ！ うちのルカにぶつかっといて まさかそんだけで済ませようってェのか？
Entry.EnglishText: Hey, you! You bumped into my Ruca, and ya think just THAT'S gonna solve this?

Entry.JapaneseText: むっ、なによ、あなた？
Entry.EnglishText: Hmph, who're you?

Entry.JapaneseText: こいつのダチだよ
Entry.EnglishText: He's my buddy.

Entry.JapaneseText: つうかおまえら 適当に口だけ謝って さっさと行っちまおうってのが丸見えなんだよ
Entry.EnglishText: Heck, it's so visibly obvious you guys're just gonna give him a half-assed apology an' then hurry and scamper off.

Entry.JapaneseText: 気に入らねェな、そういうの
Entry.EnglishText: I don't like that sorta thing.

Entry.JapaneseText: しょうがないでしょ。 私達には、急いで行かなきゃいけない 所があるんだから！
Entry.EnglishText: There's nothing we can do about that! There's somewhere we've gotta get to quick!

Entry.JapaneseText: そりゃこっちだって同じだよ。 てかなんだ？ 急いでりゃ人にぶつかってもいいのかよ？
Entry.EnglishText: It's the same for us. So what? It's all good to just bump into people 'cause you're in a hurry?

Entry.JapaneseText: そんな事一言も言ってないでしょ！
Entry.EnglishText: I never said anything like that!

Entry.JapaneseText: なにこのチンピラみたいな人！ エミル、こんなの相手にしないで行こっ
Entry.EnglishText: What is with this delinquent-like guy?! Emil, let's ignore him and just go.

Entry.JapaneseText: え？ あっ、うん
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? Uh, yeah.

Entry.JapaneseText: へっ。 女の尻に敷かれるなんざ、情けねェ男だぜ
Entry.EnglishText: Heh. It's pathetic for a man to be lead around by a woman.

Entry.JapaneseText: なんですって！？ 私のエミルをバカにしないでよ！
Entry.EnglishText: What did you say?! Don't make fun of my Emil!

Entry.JapaneseText: なんだ、やんのか？
Entry.EnglishText: What, you wanna go?

Entry.JapaneseText: やってやろうじゃない！
Entry.EnglishText: Let's do it!

Entry.JapaneseText: え？ マルタ？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? Marta?

Entry.JapaneseText: やろう、エミル！ エミルのかっこよさ、このチンピラに 見せてあげてよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Let's get him, Emil! Show this delinquent how cool you are!

Entry.JapaneseText: いくぜ、ルカ。 この生意気な奴らに、一泡吹かしてやんぜ
Entry.EnglishText: Let's gettem, Ruca. Let's give these brazen assholes a nasty surprise.

Entry.JapaneseText: え、ちょっと、スパーダ！？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? Wait a sec! Spada?!

Entry.JapaneseText: BG03a.ppt
BG01a.ppt
